allowed_work: Document local XNP Bereitschaft, current local authentication and interface status.
Create a local dry-run reader prompt that routes to the Karte/SAK without performing XNP login or productive XNP writes.
Optionally pass through the Karte/SAK morris localhost API and PC/SC list-readers probe without XNP login or productive XNP writes.
Require completed Karte/SAK Bereitschaft before XNP login testing.
Record boolean presence of local configuration without values.
Prepare local-only XNotar/register handoff steps for notarial software.
prohibited_work: Store passwords, PINs, private keys, certificate material, session cookies, or one-time codes in Git.
Bypass local XNP authentication, Amtstätigkeitskontext validation, human review, register, mailbox, or notarial action controls.
Upload client or mandate content to an LLM unless an explicit approved data-processing basis exists.
Scrape protected portals or exceed published usage limits.
day0: Confirm target mode: citizen preflight or notary-side workstation workflow.
Confirm completed Karte/SAK Bereitschaft for card, security-class-3 reader, SAK lite/XNP card path and secureFramework.
Confirm XNP installed on the same workstation/user context.
Confirm local XNP login, user role and Amtstätigkeitskontext are available without storing values.
Confirm XNotar/register module or exchange-folder route.
Confirm notarial software vendor support and local admin ownership.
day1: Create local reader-prompt evidence, authentication gate, XNotar handoff Bereitschaft plan and evidence shell without credential values.
day2: Recertify local interface status after XNP or notarial software updates.
required_accounts_or_approvals: BNotK/XNP access for the notary office
Local XNP login and active Amtstätigkeitskontext
